**Frequently Asked Questions**  
  
**Do I really need to call first, can I just take my chances and hope the vehicle is there?**  
  
If youre seeing this ad, it is likely that the vehicle IS for sale within the Autonation network. Our intent is to prevent you from showing up after the vehicle has been moved. Give us a call, let us physically touch it and confirm its availability. Well provide the local dealership name and address so that you dont waste your time.  
  
**This post is almost 30 days old. Surely you don't still have this vehicle, do you?**  
  
If the post still has a phone number, we almost certainly still have the vehicle at one of your local Autonation dealerships. Simply dial the number above and we'll be happy to point you to the correct store. We may even bring the vehicle to a store near you.  
  
**You say you help people with less than perfect credit, are you a Buy Here - Pay Here lot?**  
  
No. We are not a buy here - pay here lot. However, because we are the largest retailer of New and Used vehicles in the U.S. we have access to banks and credit unions that can be a tremendous benefit to extremely challenged credit.  
  
**Can I really secure financing with zero down payment?**  
  
Many customers actually take delivery without a checkbook or credit card. While this isn't a possibility in every situation, it is often an option when transacting with an Autonation dealership.  
  
**Do you take trade-ins?**  
  
Yes. We need to buy cars from customers every day because of the huge demand in the used vehicle market. It isn't necessary for you to buy a vehicle either. We'd love to purchase your vehicle regardless of age or mileage in most cases.  
  
**What if I want to trade in my vehicle but still owe more than it's worth.**  
  
This is another very common situation that usually won't prevent you from trading your vehicle and taking delivery of your next New or PreOwned vehicle.  
  
**Are you guys really 1price? Won't you negotiate?**  
  
We've found that every single customer wants our bottom-line best price up front. Imagine going to a dealership and telling them "don't tell me your best price, instead, keep going back and forth to your manager and waste as much of my time as possible, until we finally find your best price, and then try to guilt me into buying because you spent so much time with me". If that's actually what you want, you may need help.  
  
We put our bottom line lowest price on every pre-owned vehicle and then let you decide if, and when you want to buy it. No pressure.  
  
**So, I like this vehicle I'm looking at, but I'd rather not talk to anyone yet. What do I do?**  
  
COPY AND PASTE the link and in this ad, and find the CONTACT US tab on the right side of the Showroom Page. Just ask "Where might I see this vehicle?". Someone will respond promptly.  
  
**I think this vehicle might be the one for me, but I live several hours away. Can I prevent someone else from buying it before I get there?**  
  
Yes. We have very simple process for this very common situation. Just give us a call.

**AutoNation Honda Roseville**  
**Ask for: Sales Department**  
**☎ (279) 529-5768**  
Roseville, CA  95661   
  
  
**Frequently Asked Questions**  
  
**Do I really need to call first, can I just take my chances and hope the vehicle is there?**  
  
If youre seeing this ad, it is likely that the vehicle IS for sale within the Autonation network. Our intent is to prevent you from showing up after the vehicle has been moved. Give us a call, let us physically touch it and confirm its availability. Well provide the local dealership name and address so that you dont waste your time.  
  
**This post is almost 30 days old. Surely you don't still have this vehicle, do you?**  
  
If the post still has a phone number, we almost certainly still have the vehicle at one of your local Autonation dealerships. Simply dial the number above and we'll be happy to point you to the correct store. We may even bring the vehicle to a store near you.  
  
**You say you help people with less than perfect credit, are you a Buy Here - Pay Here lot?**  
  
No. We are not a buy here - pay here lot. However, because we are the largest retailer of New and Used vehicles in the U.S. we have access to banks and credit unions that can be a tremendous benefit to extremely challenged credit.  
  
**Can I really secure financing with zero down payment?**  
  
Many customers actually take delivery without a checkbook or credit card. While this isn't a possibility in every situation, it is often an option when transacting with an Autonation dealership.  
  
**Do you take trade-ins?**  
  
Yes. We need to buy cars from customers every day because of the huge demand in the used vehicle market. It isn't necessary for you to buy a vehicle either. We'd love to purchase your vehicle regardless of age or mileage in most cases.  
  
**What if I want to trade in my vehicle but still owe more than it's worth.**  
  
This is another very common situation that usually won't prevent you from trading your vehicle and taking delivery of your next New or PreOwned vehicle.  
  
**Are you guys really 1price? Won't you negotiate?**  
  
We've found that every single customer wants our bottom-line best price up front. Imagine going to a dealership and telling them "don't tell me your best price, instead, keep going back and forth to your manager and waste as much of my time as possible, until we finally find your best price, and then try to guilt me into buying because you spent so much time with me". If that's actually what you want, you may need help.  
  
We put our bottom line lowest price on every pre-owned vehicle and then let you decide if, and when you want to buy it. No pressure.  
  
**So, I like this vehicle I'm looking at, but I'd rather not talk to anyone yet. What do I do?**  
  
COPY AND PASTE the link and in this ad, and find the CONTACT US tab on the right side of the Showroom Page. Just ask "Where might I see this vehicle?". Someone will respond promptly.  
  
**I think this vehicle might be the one for me, but I live several hours away. Can I prevent someone else from buying it before I get there?**  
  
Yes. We have very simple process for this very common situation. Just give us a call.

Introducing the 2022 Toyota Camry Hybrid XSE, a stunning sedan that combines innovative technology, impressive fuel efficiency, and sleek design. With just over 93,500 miles, this used Toyota Camry offers a perfect balance of reliability and advanced features, making it an ideal choice for drivers seeking both performance and practicality. Equipped with a 2.5-liter naturally aspirated four-cylinder engine and a hybrid system that delivers an impressive 208 horsepower, this vehicle is built for efficiency with an estimated 44 MPG city and 47 MPG highway. Whether navigating city streets or cruising on the highway, the Camry Hybrid provides a smooth ride with front-wheel drive, complemented by adaptive cruise control, lane keep assist, and collision warning systems to ensure safety and convenience at every turn. Enjoy modern connectivity with Apple CarPlay, Bluetooth, satellite radio readiness, and a built-in Wi-Fi hotspot, along with heated seats, keyless entry, push start, and wireless phone charging—features designed to elevate your driving experience. The 2022 Toyota Camry Hybrid XSE is loaded with advanced safety and security enhancements to protect you and your passengers. It features a rear seat reminder to prevent leaving anyone behind, dual knee airbags for added protection in frontal impacts, and traffic sign recognition to keep you aware of road conditions. The regenerative braking system improves efficiency, while four-wheel ABS ensures secure stopping power. Additional security features include power door locks with anti-lockout and auto-locking functions, as well as an electronic parking brake with auto off, offering peace of mind and confidence behind the wheel. 2022 Toyota Camry Hybrid Safety and Security Features This model comes equipped with comprehensive safety features such as check rear seat reminder, dual front knee airbags, traffic sign recognition, regenerative braking system, four-wheel ABS, anti-lockout power door locks, auto-locking power door locks, and an electronic parking brake with auto off. These features work together to provide a safety net, ensuring peace of mind for drivers and passengers alike. 2022 Toyota Camry Hybrid Entertainment and Technology Features The interior boasts a 9-inch infotainment touchscreen with touch screen display, supporting smart device app compatibility through Toyota Connected Services and Amazon Alexa. Voice-operated controls make hands-free phone calls and radio usage simple, while additional electronic messaging assistance reads messages aloud and operates via voice commands. The system is enhanced by a six-speaker audio system, delivering clear sound to enjoy your favorite music and audio content while on the go. 2022 Toyota Camry Hybrid Performance Features Performance-wise, the Camry Hybrid features an auto start/stop system that enhances efficiency during city driving, paired with a lithium-ion battery for the electric motor that provides seamless delivery of power. The tuned sport suspension further elevates the driving experience by offering improved handling and stability, making this sedan as agile and responsive as it is fuel-efficient.

Overview  
This 2005 Toyota Camry XLE pairs Toyota's proven 2.4L I4 (160 hp / 163 lb-ft) with excellent real-world economy and low ownership mileage. EPA-rated at 21 MPG city and 31 MPG highway, this Camry offers dependable daily driving with a comfortable, well-equipped cabin.

- XLE Premium Plus Package  
- Optional features included on this vehicle:

Factory Default Features (detailed)  
As an XLE trim, this Camry is factory-equipped for comfort, convenience and safety. Key standard features include:  
  
- Interior comfort and seating  
 - Genuine leather-trimmed seating surfaces in Fawn for a refined cabin appearance  
 - Power-adjustable front seating for driver comfort and support  
 - Heated front seats (included on this vehicle)  
 - Ample rear seating with comfortable cushioning and supportive contours for long trips  
  
- Climate and convenience  
 - Automatic climate control to maintain a consistent interior temperature  
 - Power windows and power door locks with remote keyless entry for ease of use  
 - Cruise control for relaxed highway driving  
 - Tilt-adjustable steering wheel with integrated controls for common functions  
  
- Audio and connectivity  
 - Well-appointed factory audio system with AM/FM and CD capability; XLE Premium audio enhancements available via package equipment  
 - Easy-to-reach center stack and logically arranged controls for intuitive operation  
  
- Exterior and wheels  
 - Distinctive XLE exterior trim finished in Phantom Gray Pearl  
 - 16-inch aluminum alloy wheels improving both appearance and ride quality (included)  
 - Power moonroof for added light and ventilation (included)  
  
- Safety and structure  
 - Dual front airbags as standard  
 - Side-impact and side curtain airbags included on this vehicle for enhanced occupant protection  
 - Anti-lock braking system (ABS) and a structurally robust body design engineered for occupant safety  
 - LATCH anchors for child seat installation  
  
Driving Character and Mechanical Notes  
The 2.4L inline-4 delivers a balanced blend of everyday power and fuel efficiency, mated to a smooth-shifting automatic transmission. The Camry's suspension tuning emphasizes a comfortable, composed ride with predictable handlingideal for commuting and long-distance driving alike. Routine Toyota build quality and maintenance history contribute to this vehicle's excellent overall condition.  
  
Condition & History  
- Excellent overall condition inside and out  
- Clean CARFAX report  
- One previous owner  
- Below 164,000 miles; averaging less than 8,000 miles per year

Experience the sublime elegance of the 2019 Toyota Camry XSE, a masterful blend of performance and luxury. Drenched in a stunning Wind Chill Pearl exterior, this automotive marvel boasts a spirited 2.5L I4 engine, unleashing a formidable 206 horsepower and 186 ft-lbs of torque, ensuring every drive is a thrilling adventure. Step inside to be enveloped by the striking Cockpit Red interior, where sophistication meets comfort in a symphony of design.  
  
This exceptional vehicle comes equipped with a plethora of factory-default features, including a state-of-the-art infotainment system with a touchscreen display, Bluetooth connectivity, and a premium sound system, delivering an unparalleled auditory experience. Revel in the convenience of a rearview camera, adaptive cruise control, and a suite of advanced safety features, all crafted to elevate your driving experience to new heights.   
  
With a clean CARFAX report and in excellent overall condition, this 2019 Toyota Camry XSE is not just a car; it's a statement of style and performance waiting to be claimed. Embrace the extraordinary and make it yours today!

**Frequently Asked Questions**  
  
**Do I really need to call first, can I just take my chances and hope the vehicle is there?**  
  
If youre seeing this ad, it is likely that the vehicle IS for sale within the Autonation network. Our intent is to prevent you from showing up after the vehicle has been moved. Give us a call, let us physically touch it and confirm its availability. Well provide the local dealership name and address so that you dont waste your time.  
  
**This post is almost 30 days old. Surely you don't still have this vehicle, do you?**  
  
If the post still has a phone number, we almost certainly still have the vehicle at one of your local Autonation dealerships. Simply dial the number above and we'll be happy to point you to the correct store. We may even bring the vehicle to a store near you.  
  
**You say you help people with less than perfect credit, are you a Buy Here - Pay Here lot?**  
  
No. We are not a buy here - pay here lot. However, because we are the largest retailer of New and Used vehicles in the U.S. we have access to banks and credit unions that can be a tremendous benefit to extremely challenged credit.  
  
**Can I really secure financing with zero down payment?**  
  
Many customers actually take delivery without a checkbook or credit card. While this isn't a possibility in every situation, it is often an option when transacting with an Autonation dealership.  
  
**Do you take trade-ins?**  
  
Yes. We need to buy cars from customers every day because of the huge demand in the used vehicle market. It isn't necessary for you to buy a vehicle either. We'd love to purchase your vehicle regardless of age or mileage in most cases.  
  
**What if I want to trade in my vehicle but still owe more than it's worth.**  
  
This is another very common situation that usually won't prevent you from trading your vehicle and taking delivery of your next New or PreOwned vehicle.  
  
**Are you guys really 1price? Won't you negotiate?**  
  
We've found that every single customer wants our bottom-line best price up front. Imagine going to a dealership and telling them "don't tell me your best price, instead, keep going back and forth to your manager and waste as much of my time as possible, until we finally find your best price, and then try to guilt me into buying because you spent so much time with me". If that's actually what you want, you may need help.  
  
We put our bottom line lowest price on every pre-owned vehicle and then let you decide if, and when you want to buy it. No pressure.  
  
**So, I like this vehicle I'm looking at, but I'd rather not talk to anyone yet. What do I do?**  
  
COPY AND PASTE the link and in this ad, and find the CONTACT US tab on the right side of the Showroom Page. Just ask "Where might I see this vehicle?". Someone will respond promptly.  
  
**I think this vehicle might be the one for me, but I live several hours away. Can I prevent someone else from buying it before I get there?**  
  
Yes. We have very simple process for this very common situation. Just give us a call.

Behold a modern classic of comfort, efficiency, and unshakable reliability: a 2006 Toyota Camry LE finished in the understated, sophisticated Lunar Mist Metallic with a warm Taupe interior. Under its sculpted hood resides a spirited 2.0L naturally aspirated inline-4 DOHC 16-valve engine the very heart of Toyota engineering that delivers dependable performance and exceptional fuel economy: an EPA-style 21 MPG city / 31 MPG highway. This exceptionally preserved example has seen fewer than 113,000 miles total averaging under 6,000 miles per year and presents in excellent overall condition with a clean CARFAX and a single, careful owner.  
  
Factory-equipped comforts and conveniences (presented as the Camry LE left the factory):  
- Power amenities: power windows with driver one-touch down, power door locks, and power-adjustable side mirrors for easy personalization and everyday convenience.   
- Entrée and security: remote keyless entry and factory immobilizer for peace of mind and simple, secure access.   
- Climate and comfort: efficient air conditioning with intuitive controls and well-contoured Taupe cloth seating designed for supportive long-distance comfort; driver seat with adjustable lumbar support and smooth manual adjustments to tailor your driving position.   
- Interior practicality: a roomy cabin with generous rear legroom, a 60/40 split-folding rear seat for flexible cargo and passenger arrangements, center armrest and cupholders, illuminated vanity mirrors, and ample storage cubbies for everyday life.   
- Audio and instrumentation: factory stereo with AM/FM and CD playback through carefully positioned speakers for clear sound, a logically laid-out dash with easy-to-read gauges and trip information to keep you informed and in control.   
- Driving aids: cruise control and a tilt steering column that make highway travel relaxed and effortless.   
- Safety engineering: Toyota's thoughtful factory safety package including robust front occupant protection and supplemental side protection, anti-lock braking technology for controlled stops, and child-safety features such as rear door child locks and LATCH anchors for secure child-seat installation.  
  
Mechanically, the Camry LE is built around a durable front-wheel-drive platform with a smoothly functioning automatic transmission (designed for relaxed, efficient commuting), refined suspension tuning for composed highway manners and confident cornering, and Toyota's reputation for low-cost ownership and long service life.  
  
This Camry LE is more than transportation it is a refined, practical companion that blends frugal running costs with true everyday luxury. With its rare low mileage, impeccable presentation, single-owner history and clean CARFAX, it's an exceptional opportunity for the discriminating buyer who demands both substance and style. Arrange a viewing or test drive to experience the meticulous balance of comfort, economy, and durability that only a well-kept Camry can deliver.

Body:  
 Selling my trusty 2007 Toyota Camry LE. I have owned this car since 2013, and it has been an incredibly reliable daily commuter for the past 13 years. It has never left me stranded. I just washed and vacuumed it, and it's ready for a new owner.  
   
 The Good:  
   
 Mileage: Only 122,976 original miles (very low for a 2007 Toyota!).  
   
 Clean California Title in my name, pink slip in hand.  
   
 Can do California Smog Check THIS WEEK when deal is done! You can go straight to the DMV and register it today.  
   
 Mechanically solid: Engine runs smooth, transmission shifts perfectly, A/C blows cold.  
   
 NO Check Engine Light.  
   
 Full Transparency (I want to be 100% honest, so we don't waste each other's time):  
   
 It’s a 19-year-old car, so it has cosmetic wear and tear. There is a noticeable dent on the rear passenger side door/fender area (see photo).  
   
 The TPMS (Tire Pressure) light is on. The tires are fully inflated and fine, the sensor batteries are just dead from old age.  
   
 Like most 2007-2009 Camrys with the 2.4L engine, it does consume a little oil between oil changes. I just check the dipstick regularly and top it off when needed. It runs perfectly fine.  
   
 Price: $4,600 (Cash only).  
 Priced to sell quickly this week. Dealerships are asking $7k+ for these.  
   
 We can meet in a safe, public location (like a police station parking lot or busy shopping center) in the East Bay / San Leandro area. Please message me with your phone number if you are a serious cash buyer.

This used 2024 Toyota Camry SE offers a compelling blend of style, technology, and reliability that makes it an attractive choice for discerning drivers. With only 21,892 miles on the clock, this Midnight Black Metallic sedan exemplifies the enduring quality and value Toyota is known for. The sleek exterior paired with a refined Black Mixed Media interior creates a sophisticated ambiance, perfect for both daily commuting and weekend getaways. Equipped with advanced features like adaptive cruise control, Apple CarPlay, a backup camera, Bluetooth connectivity, collision warning, lane keep assist, satellite radio readiness, and a WiFi hotspot, this used Camry ensures you stay connected and safe on every journey. Its 2.5-liter four-cylinder engine delivers 203 horsepower, offering a smooth, responsive drive with impressive fuel efficiency of 28 mpg in the city and 39 mpg on the highway. The FWD drivetrain and 4-door configuration comfortably seat five passengers, making it an ideal family sedan or daily driver. This used Toyota Camry SE stands out with a comprehensive suite of safety and security features designed to protect you and your loved ones. It includes automatic emergency braking, especially useful during intersection or junction turns, and a check rear seat reminder to prevent accidental oversight. Dual front knee airbags enhance frontal crash protection, while traffic sign recognition helps keep you aware of road regulations. The vehicle also features 4-wheel ABS, emergency braking preparation, auto-locking power door locks, and a pre-collision warning system tailored for intersection or junction turns, all working together to provide peace of mind. These safety systems combine to create a confident driving experience, whether navigating busy city streets or open highways. 2024 Toyota Camry Safety and Security Features The safety suite on this used Camry includes automatic emergency braking for intersection and junction turns, a check rear seat reminder, dual front knee airbags, traffic sign recognition, 4-wheel ABS, emergency braking preparation, auto-locking power door locks, and a pre-collision warning system for intersection or junction turns. These features prioritize your safety, alerting you to potential hazards and helping prevent accidents before they happen. 2024 Toyota Camry Entertainment and Technology Features Equipped with a 7-inch touch screen display, this used Camry offers a seamless infotainment experience with voice-operated radio, Amazon Alexa-compatible connected in-car apps, and smart device app compatibility through Toyota Connected Services. Hands-free phone call integration ensures safe communication, while electronic messaging assistance with read and voice-operated functions keeps you connected without distraction. The sound system includes six speakers, auxiliary USB audio input, and a user-friendly interface designed to keep you entertained and informed on every trip. 2024 Toyota Camry Performance Features The tuned sport suspension on this used Camry SE enhances handling and ride quality, providing a more engaging driving experience. Coupled with its efficient 2.5-liter naturally aspirated engine, the vehicle balances performance and comfort, making it an excellent choice for drivers seeking both agility and reliability in a midsize sedan.

Introducing the 2018 Toyota Camry LE - the car that makes you feel like you've arrived, even if you're just driving to the grocery store for a gallon of milk. Dressed in a striking Ruby Flare Pearl exterior, this beauty doesn't just turn heads; it makes them do a double-take, and maybe even a triple if they really enjoy a good car!   
  
Under the hood, you'll find a peppy 2.5L I4 engine that churns out a respectable 203 horsepower and 184 ft-lbs of torque. It's like having a little engine that could - because it really does! Want to merge onto the freeway? No problem! This Camry has got your back (and your front) with all the power you need, and it promises to do so without guzzling gas like a thirsty camel. With a stellar fuel economy of 28 MPG in the city and a jaw-dropping 39 MPG on the highway, you can save your pennies for that fancy coffee you keep saying you'll cut back on.   
  
Step inside this delightful chariot and you'll be greeted by an Ash cloth interior that's as comfortable as your favorite pair of sweatpants (but way more socially acceptable for public outings). The Camry LE comes loaded with factory default features, including a 7-inch touchscreen infotainment system that's so user-friendly, even your technologically challenged uncle could figure it out! Enjoy Bluetooth connectivity for hands-free calls and music streaming - because who doesn't want to rock out to their favorite tunes while stuck in traffic?   
  
You'll also find a rearview camera that makes backing up feel like a game of Tetris, along with adaptive cruise control that takes the stress out of long drives. The Toyota Safety Sense suite is there, too, with pre-collision warning and lane departure alert, ensuring you and your passengers feel as safe as a cat in a sunbeam.   
  
This 2018 Camry LE is in excellent overall condition with a clean CARFAX report - it's like the car equivalent of a straight-A student who also volunteers at the local animal shelter! So why wait? Come take this Ruby Flare Pearl beauty for a spin and see why the Camry isn't just a car; it's a lifestyle choice (albeit a really smart and economical one). Get ready to drive in style and comfort, all while laughing in the face of rising gas prices!

Selling my 1993 Toyota Camry LE, 4-cylinder. It has 132,000 original miles and has been meticulously maintained exclusively by the Toyota dealership.  
   
 Recent services include: timing belt, water pump, full tune-up, valve cover gasket, suspension work, oil pan gasket—lots of major servicing, all done at the dealership. I’ve got all records on hand.  
   
 This is a one-owner vehicle, and I even still have some original cassette tapes for it.  
   
 The ‘93 Camrys are legendary for reliability—this one’s no exception. Body is in really nice shape, no accidents, no paint fading. Interior is pretty clean for its age. Great gas mileage, no mechanical issues, good tires, just passed smog.  
   
 Asking $4,400—price is firm. You won’t easily find another in this condition, especially with such low mileage. Original owner, all maintenance records on hand.

 This vehicle features a 2.5L DOHC inline four engine producing 178 horsepower and 170 lb ft of torque, paired with a front wheel drive system and a 6 speed automatic transmission with available Sport mode for responsive driving. It includes a sport tuned suspension with independent MacPherson strut front suspension and a multi link rear suspension for improved handling. Exterior highlights include SE specific styling, 17 inch alloy wheels, rear spoiler, projector headlamps, fog lights, heated power mirrors, and chrome exhaust accents. Inside, the car offers sport front seats with enhanced bolstering, sport trim upholstery, a leather trimmed steering wheel, a power adjustable driver’s seat, air conditioning with rear vents, and a 60 40 split folding rear seat for added cargo flexibility. Infotainment features include Bluetooth connectivity, USB and auxiliary inputs, steering wheel mounted controls, and a multi information display, with optional navigation and upgraded audio available on some models. Convenience features include power windows and locks, keyless entry, cruise control, and a tire pressure monitoring system. Safety equipment includes a full advanced airbag system, ABS with electronic brake force distribution and brake assist, vehicle stability and traction control, child seat anchors, and an engine immobilizer for added security.

Price negotiable! Located in Lincoln, CA, on a non-op.  
   
 Selling my girlfriend's 1994 Toyota Camry Coupe LE V6! Camry Coupes are fairly rare compared to the four-door variants, so if you're after a Camry unlike every other one on the road, this one's for you.  
   
 Currently has 279,062 miles and sometimes lurches on the freeway or has trouble starting. The fuel filter has been changed (not a fun time), it has a new knock sensor, and a new electric fuel pump comes with the car. Also comes with new front brakes (rotors and pads) and a new battery.   
   
 It could use a good detail, especially on the left side, where something weird is happening with the paint. Perhaps a bad respray at some point in the past?

**Frequently Asked Questions**  
  
**Do I really need to call first, can I just take my chances and hope the vehicle is there?**  
  
If youre seeing this ad, it is likely that the vehicle IS for sale within the Autonation network. Our intent is to prevent you from showing up after the vehicle has been moved. Give us a call, let us physically touch it and confirm its availability. Well provide the local dealership name and address so that you dont waste your time.  
  
**This post is almost 30 days old. Surely you don't still have this vehicle, do you?**  
  
If the post still has a phone number, we almost certainly still have the vehicle at one of your local Autonation dealerships. Simply dial the number above and we'll be happy to point you to the correct store. We may even bring the vehicle to a store near you.  
  
**You say you help people with less than perfect credit, are you a Buy Here - Pay Here lot?**  
  
No. We are not a buy here - pay here lot. However, because we are the largest retailer of New and Used vehicles in the U.S. we have access to banks and credit unions that can be a tremendous benefit to extremely challenged credit.  
  
**Can I really secure financing with zero down payment?**  
  
Many customers actually take delivery without a checkbook or credit card. While this isn't a possibility in every situation, it is often an option when transacting with an Autonation dealership.  
  
**Do you take trade-ins?**  
  
Yes. We need to buy cars from customers every day because of the huge demand in the used vehicle market. It isn't necessary for you to buy a vehicle either. We'd love to purchase your vehicle regardless of age or mileage in most cases.  
  
**What if I want to trade in my vehicle but still owe more than it's worth.**  
  
This is another very common situation that usually won't prevent you from trading your vehicle and taking delivery of your next New or PreOwned vehicle.  
  
**Are you guys really 1price? Won't you negotiate?**  
  
We've found that every single customer wants our bottom-line best price up front. Imagine going to a dealership and telling them "don't tell me your best price, instead, keep going back and forth to your manager and waste as much of my time as possible, until we finally find your best price, and then try to guilt me into buying because you spent so much time with me". If that's actually what you want, you may need help.  
  
We put our bottom line lowest price on every pre-owned vehicle and then let you decide if, and when you want to buy it. No pressure.  
  
**So, I like this vehicle I'm looking at, but I'd rather not talk to anyone yet. What do I do?**  
  
COPY AND PASTE the link and in this ad, and find the CONTACT US tab on the right side of the Showroom Page. Just ask "Where might I see this vehicle?". Someone will respond promptly.  
  
**I think this vehicle might be the one for me, but I live several hours away. Can I prevent someone else from buying it before I get there?**  
  
Yes. We have very simple process for this very common situation. Just give us a call.

Behold a timeless example of automotive balance and refinement: a 2005 Toyota Camry LE V6, resplendent in Phantom Gray Pearl with a serene Stone cloth interior. This is not merely transportation it is a composed statement of engineering restraint and everyday luxury, a sedan that marries the effortless muscle of a V6 with the legendary Toyota virtues of longevity, comfort, and economical stewardship.  
  
Heart and performance  
At the heart of this Camry lies the resonant 3.0-liter V6 engine, rated at a robust 210 horsepower and 220 lb-ft of torque. Mated to a smooth-shifting 5-speed automatic transmission with overdrive, this powertrain delivers confident, linear acceleration when summoned and hushed, relaxed cruising when not. The V6 provides spirited passing power on the highway and a satisfying surge from city speeds, yet it remains refined hushed at cruise, quick to respond, and remarkably tractable in everyday driving. Front-wheel drive and a well-tuned suspension layout (McPherson struts up front, multilink setup in the rear) combine to yield a composed, planted ride that is both secure in corners and forgiving over imperfect pavement.  
  
Economy and longevity  
Despite its V6 performance, this Camry is an exemplar of sensible fuel economy: an EPA-typical 18 MPG in the city and 26 MPG on the highway. With below 136,000 miles on the odometer and an average usage of less than 7,000 miles per year, this vehicle has been gently accumulated mileage-wise and remains in excellent overall condition a platform primed to provide many more years of reliable service.  
  
Exterior presence  
Finished in Phantom Gray Pearl, the exterior presents a subtle, sophisticated sheen a pearl effect that catches light and lends depth to the sculpted lines of the Camry's bodywork. The halogen headlamps and well-proportioned front fascia create a look that is both modern and enduring. Every panel aligns with Toyota's exacting factory tolerances, and the paint retains a long-lasting luster that complements the car's tasteful silhouette.  
  
Interior luxury and practicality  
Step inside to the Stone cloth interior a cabin that favors refinement and purpose. The front seats are ergonomically shaped for extended comfort, with supportive bolstering and thoughtful cushion geometry that make long drives a pleasure. The rear seat offers generous legroom and a comfortable bench for three, with a folding center armrest for added convenience. The trunk provides ample room for luggage, golf bags, or weekly errands, underscoring the Camry's reputation as a practical family sedan.  
  
Factory-standard features (in detail)  
This LE V6 arrives factory-equipped with an array of comfort, convenience, and safety features designed for long-term satisfaction:  
  
- Power accessories: Power windows with driver one-touch down, power door locks, and power-adjustable side mirrors make daily use effortless.  
- Keyless convenience: Remote keyless entry provides swift access and peace of mind.  
- Climate comfort: Automatic air conditioning/climate control delivers consistent cabin temperatures and a well-filtered interior environment for all passengers.  
- Audio and connectivity: A factory AM/FM/CD audio system supplies clear, balanced sound through multiple speakers. Steering-wheel-mounted audio controls allow safe, intuitive adjustments while driving.  
- Driving aids: Cruise control helps maintain steady highway speed for relaxed long-distance travel.  
- Instrumentation and ergonomics: An easy-to-read instrument cluster, tilt steering wheel, and logically arranged controls afford an intuitive cockpit experience. Storage pockets, cupholders, and thoughtful cubbies enhance day-to-day usability.  
- Seating and trim: Durable Stone cloth upholstery resists wear while offering a pleasant tactile feel. Front bucket seats provide supportive ergonomics for both driver and passenger.  
- Safety systems: Built-in safety includes dual front airbags, front-seat mounted side airbags, and advanced occupant p

Selling a 1994 Toyota Camry with only 48,000 original miles. This is an extremely low-mileage car for its age and runs reliably. Interior is clean and well-kept. Car has a brand new battery and is ready to drive.  
   
 Details:  
 • Year: 1994  
 • Make/Model: Toyota Camry  
 • Mileage: 48,000 original miles  
 • Clean title  
 • Interior: clean and in good condition  
 • Mechanical: runs well, dependable Toyota engine  
 • New battery recently installed  
   
 Condition notes (being upfront):  
 • Exterior has scratches and small cosmetic damage consistent with age  
 • One headlight plastic is cracked/softened  
 • Cosmetic only — does not affect drivability  
   
 This is a great option for:  
 • Someone looking for a reliable daily driver  
 • A first car  
 • A commuter or backup car  
 • Anyone who values low mileage and longevity over perfect cosmetics  
   
 Older Toyotas with mileage this low are hard to find. Selling as-is.  
   
 Price: $3800  
 Serious inquiries only. Cash preferred. Local pickup.

Hello  
   
 I am selling a 2004 Toyota Solara (2-door Camry) with a SLE trim and the legendary V6 engine (3MZ-FE). This car has about 158,350 miles and I am the third owner. I purchased this car as my primary commuter car knowing how good these cars are made (this Solara is essentially a clone of Lexus ES330) and I have done all the preventative maintenance after acquiring this car. This is the top trim (SLE) with a touch screen navigation and JBL sound system. I will also include a bluetooth to FM adaptor so you can play music from your phone. The price includes registration paid through December 2026, as well as a fresh full synthetic oil change, so the net cost to you is $4100 (not counting the registration which you would pay otherwise)  
   
 I would have loved to keep this car forever as they are built to last over 300k miles (just search on the internet). Unfortunately, I had a personal injury due to which I am not able to drive at the moment. Car located in Sunnyvale (close to downtown).  
   
 Since acquiring the car, I have spent over $3,000 restoring the car and doing all the preventative maintenance on the car. All work will come with receipts. Car is currently maintained by one of Sunnyvale's top mechanic shop, Hank Auto Repair, and we can go a thorough inspection at a mechanic of your choice.  
   
 The Good  
 \* New Timing Belt Kit at 145k, good for next 80,000 miles  
 \* New tires at 145k, good for next 40,000 miles  
 \* Oil changed every 5k miles with full synthetic (Jan 2026 fresh oil)  
 \* New Valve Cover gasket at 148K, no engine oil leaks  
 \* New Spark plugs at 148k miles, full tune-up  
 \* Rack and pinion boots changed, alignment done at 148k miles  
 \* Full brake service done with new brake pads at 148k miles  
 \* New air filter, cabin air filter, wipers at 145k  
 \* Battery, good to go was changed at 140k  
 \* Transmission Oil was changed by the previous owner, oil is clean  
   
 Some TLC  
 \* The car's right side (driver) had been painted due to previous owner's daughter scratching the side, as a result, there is a slight color imbalance (see pics)  
 \* There are minor dings on the car (see pics), and paint discoloration on the on the alloy wheels  
 \* Car used to throw P 0441 code (Small EVAP leak). My mechanic advised me to change the gas cap, which I have done, and the light has not come on in the last 500 miles  
 \* The information via LED panel is slightly depressed due to broken clips  
 \* Car seats are leather and they had a small rip, I have put on car seat covers  
 \* Small cracks in the interior near the glove compartment, very common for this model due to age

**PLEASE READ BEFORE REACHING OUT**  
   
 Selling a 1999 Toyota Camry XLE V6. Title is Salvage/Rebuilt, and I am the owner on the pink slip. This is the perfect car if you need a cheap reliable car to commute or a second car for whatever purposes.   
   
 Carfax provided upon request.  
   
   
 **The good:**  
   
 - Engine and transmission are really strong for its age. No leaks whatsoever.  
   
 - Paint is also very good for its age. No clear coat fading at all.  
   
 - Regular maintenance done by previous owners, oil always changed on time.  
   
 - Full size spare tire  
   
 - Working sunroof  
   
 - AC blows super cold  
   
 - Leather seats, heated + power reclining  
   
 - CarPlay / dashcam installed in car  
   
   
 **The not-so-good:**  
   
 - Car is salvage title due to minor body damage as seen on the passenger side of the vehicle. Frame is straight and all mechanical components work as they should.   
   
 - Car runs lukewarm on the freeway due to stuck thermostat. Replacement is provided in pics.  
   
 - Window regulator on driver front side needs to be replaced. Replacement is also provided in the pics.  
   
 - Surface rust on wheels. Can be removed by normal treatments without wheel replacement, just never had the time to.  
   
 - Timing belt needs to be replaced soon (last replaced about ~85-90k miles) Engine is non-interference so if the belt snaps it won’t break the car, but replacement is ideal.   
   
 Please text (four one 5) - s i x 8 three - e i g h t t h r e e 99 with the following info if you are interested:  
   
 - Your name  
 - What city you’re based out of  
 - Best time for you to meet  
   
 Por favor, no envíe consultas en español.  
   
 Thanks for looking!

 📌 About the Car  
   
 This was my dad’s car prior to his passing. He used it mainly as a work/hauling vehicle (basically his “truck”), so the focus was always on basic reliability rather than comfort or cosmetics.  
   
 I recently detailed the interior, removed all seats, steam-cleaned the seats and carpets, and put everything back in clean. I’m being fully transparent and listing all known issues and recent maintenance — I believe that’s the right way to sell a car.  
   
 You’re welcome to bring a mechanic to inspect it.  
   
 Great for:  
 • First-time driver  
 • Cheap, reliable point-A-to-B car  
 • Someone who needs transportation now  
 • Parts car if that’s your thing  
   
 ⸻  
   
 ✅ Pros  
 • Starts up strong every time  
 • Reliable basic transportation  
 • Passes California smog  
 • Rear shocks replaced  
 • Front stabilizer links replaced  
 • Sway bar bushings replaced  
 • Brakes replaced within the last 5k miles  
 • Full spare tire in the trunk  
   
 ⸻  
   
 ⚠️ Cons / Known Issues  
 • Clear coat peeling on the hood  
 • No A/C (purchased this way — likely related to previous owner)  
 • Aftermarket stereo and speakers were removed  
 • ABS light is on (from previous owner)  
 • Does not affect daily driving  
 • Does not affect CA smog  
 • Steering issue:  
 • When turning left, it doesn’t have full turning capacity  
 • Example: U-turns require a 2-point turn  
 • Possibly inner tie rods or rack & pinion (not diagnosed)  
 • Tires will need replacement in the near future  
   
 ⸻  
   
   
 This is not a perfect car, but it runs, drives, and passes smog. If you need something inexpensive and reliable and don’t care about looks or features, this is it.
